description: Structured command catalog for NC1 client-facing interop.

commands.purpose: Return profile identity, version, and contract references.
commands.response_contract: Returns profile id/version and supported capability declarations.
commands.error_behavior: Returns standardized error response if descriptor unavailable.
commands.notes: Baseline entry-point command for NC1-aware consumers.

commands.purpose: Read declared configuration and discovery groups with mutability metadata.
commands.response_contract: Returns grouped config payload including read_only and writable fields.
commands.error_behavior: Returns authorization or unsupported-group errors as applicable.
commands.notes: Clients must not infer writability outside explicit metadata.

commands.purpose: Apply updates to writable operational or commissioning config groups.
preconditions: Target groups are writable in current state.
commands.response_contract: Returns accepted/rejected fields and validation issues.
commands.error_behavior: Validation errors are field-scoped and non-fatal to unrelated fields.
commands.notes: Commit behavior depends on commissioning mode and stage policy.

commands.purpose: Return current commissioning state, stage, blockers, and next actions.
commands.response_contract: Returns commissioning state model including editable groups and blocking validations.
commands.error_behavior: Returns unavailable error if commissioning capability is not supported.
commands.notes: Authoritative source for rendering commissioning progress in NexSight.

commands.purpose: Attempt stage transition after validating required data for current stage.
preconditions: Required fields for stage have candidate values.
commands.response_contract: Returns accepted stage transition or blocking validation reasons.
commands.error_behavior: Stage transition denial includes machine-readable blocker codes.
commands.notes: Does not imply final commit unless target stage policy says auto-commit.

commands.purpose: Commit staged commissioning/configuration values and release runtime.
commands.response_contract: Returns commit result, applied revision, and refresh requirements.
commands.error_behavior: Commit failure includes rollback status and required corrective actions.
commands.notes: Clients should perform authoritative refresh after successful commit.

commands.purpose: Return test inventory with hazard/gating metadata for UI rendering.
preconditions: Requester authorized for test discovery scope.
commands.response_contract: Returns machine-readable test entries and availability states.
commands.error_behavior: Returns authorization or feature-disabled errors when applicable.
commands.notes: Preferred source for NexSight test listing; avoid hardcoded catalogs.

commands.purpose: Run a named component test instance from the declared test catalog.
preconditions: Requested test is listed and currently available.
commands.response_contract: Returns accepted run id with progress and completion summary channels.
commands.error_behavior: Blocked reasons are returned with gating codes.
commands.notes: Optional to allow constrained implementations without active test execution APIs.

commands.purpose: Request immediate stop behavior across commandable subsystems.
commands.response_contract: Returns stop acceptance and resulting safety/state indicators.
commands.error_behavior: If stop cannot be applied, response includes highest-severity blocker code.
commands.notes: Consumers may treat this as always available in NC1.

commands.purpose: Request transition into test mode when implementation supports controlled test mode.
preconditions: No active failsafe or stop blocker.
commands.response_contract: Returns requested transition outcome and constraints.
commands.error_behavior: Unsupported or blocked responses include explicit reason codes.
commands.notes: Do not hard-require for baseline NC1 compatibility.

commands.purpose: Request return to non-test operating state when test mode is active.
commands.response_contract: Returns transition result and any required safety acknowledgements.
commands.notes: Extension command surface for advanced implementations.

commands.purpose: Open a best-effort remote diagnostic log stream.
commands.response_contract: Returns stream endpoint metadata when available.
commands.error_behavior: Availability and retention behavior are implementation-defined.
commands.notes: Experimental; consumers must feature-detect and degrade gracefully.
